archive.description: Settings for the zero-loss compression archive (large tool outputs saved to disk)

ephemeral.description: Replace large results with summary+ref (ctx_expand to retrieve). Env: LEAN_CTX_EPHEMERAL

max_age_hours.description: Maximum age of archived entries before cleanup

max_disk_mb.description: Maximum total disk usage for the archive

threshold_chars.description: Minimum output size (chars) to trigger archiving

autonomy.description: Controls autonomous background behaviors (preload, dedup, consolidation)

auto_preload.description: Auto-preload related files on first read

cognition_loop_enabled.description: Enable the background cognition loop (periodic knowledge consolidation)

cognition_loop_max_steps.description: Maximum steps per cognition loop iteration

consolidate_every_calls.description: Consolidate knowledge every N tool calls

dedup_threshold.description: Number of repeated reads before dedup triggers

boundary_policy.description: Cross-project boundary and access control policies

audit_cross_access.description: Log audit events when cross-project access occurs

cross_project_import.description: Allow importing knowledge from other projects

contribute_enabled.description: Enable contributing anonymized stats to lean-ctx cloud

custom_aliases.description: Custom command aliases (array of {command, alias} entries). Note: field names are 'command' and 'alias' (not 'name')

embedding.description: Semantic-embedding engine settings (model selection for ctx_semantic_search)

model.description: Local ONNX embedding model for ctx_semantic_search. One of: minilm (all-MiniLM-L6-v2, 384d, default), jina-code-v2 (768d, code-optimized), nomic (768d). Switching models re-indexes once on the next search.

auto_publish.description: Automatically (re)publish your Wrapped recap when you run `lean-ctx gain` (opt-in, off by default; throttled and sends only an aggregate payload)

auto_publish_interval_hours.description: Minimum hours between automatic publishes (throttle; default 24)

display_name.description: Optional display name shown on your published card / leaderboard entry

leaderboard.description: When auto-publishing, also list the card on the public opt-in leaderboard

ide_paths.description: Per-IDE allowed paths. Keys are agent names (cursor, codex, opencode, antigravity, etc.), values are arrays of paths to index for that agent

llm.description: Optional LLM enhancement settings (query expansion, contradiction explanation). Deterministic fallback when disabled or unreachable.

api_key.description: API key for OpenRouter or Anthropic backends

enabled.description: Enable optional LLM enhancements (query expansion, contradiction explanation)

model.description: Model name for the selected backend

loop_detection.description: Loop detection settings for preventing repeated identical tool calls

search_group_limit.description: Maximum unique searches within a loop window

tool_total_limits.description: Per-tool total call limits within a session. Keys are tool names, values are max calls

window_secs.description: Time window in seconds for loop detection

lsp.description: LSP server binary overrides. Map language name to custom binary path

memory.embeddings.description: Embeddings memory settings for semantic search

max_facts.description: Maximum number of embedding facts stored

memory.gotcha.description: Gotcha memory settings (project-specific warnings and pitfalls)

default_decay_rate.description: Default decay rate for gotcha importance

retrieval_budget_per_room.description: Maximum gotchas retrieved per room per query

max_facts.description: Maximum number of knowledge facts stored per project

recall_facts_limit.description: Maximum facts returned per recall query

timeline_limit.description: Maximum number of timeline entries returned

decay_rate.description: Rate at which knowledge confidence decays over time

low_confidence_threshold.description: Threshold below which facts are considered low-confidence

stale_days.description: Days after which unused facts are considered stale

max_procedures.description: Maximum number of learned procedures stored

max_window_size.description: Maximum window size for pattern analysis

min_repetitions.description: Minimum repetitions before a pattern is stored

min_sequence_len.description: Minimum sequence length for procedure detection

providers.description: External context providers (GitHub, GitLab, Jira, MCP bridges, etc.). Set tokens via env vars (GITHUB_TOKEN, GITLAB_TOKEN). MCP bridges connect external MCP servers as context sources.

auto_index.description: Auto-ingest provider results into BM25/embedding indexes

cache_ttl_secs.description: Default cache TTL for provider results (seconds)

enabled.description: Master switch for the provider subsystem (GitHub, GitLab, etc.)

github.api_url.description: GitHub API base URL (for GitHub Enterprise)

gitlab.api_url.description: GitLab API base URL (for self-hosted instances)

mcp_bridges.<name>.args.description: Arguments for the MCP server command

mcp_bridges.<name>.auth_env.description: Environment variable name containing auth token for MCP server

mcp_bridges.<name>.command.description: Command to spawn a local MCP server (stdio transport)

mcp_bridges.<name>.url.description: HTTP/SSE URL for a remote MCP server

proxy.description: Proxy upstream configuration for API routing

anthropic_upstream.description: Custom upstream URL for Anthropic API proxy

gemini_upstream.description: Custom upstream URL for Gemini API proxy

openai_upstream.description: Custom upstream URL for OpenAI API proxy

allow_auto_reroot.description: Allow automatic project-root re-rooting when absolute paths outside the jail are seen

auto_capture.description: Automatic knowledge capture from tool findings

bm25_max_cache_mb.description: Maximum BM25 cache file size in MB

buddy_enabled.description: Enable the buddy system for multi-agent coordination

cache_policy.description: Cache policy for ctx_read: aggressive (13-tok stubs), safe (map on hit), off (always disk)

compression_level.description: Unified output-style level for the model's prose (not tool-output compression). lite=plain concise (default), standard/max=denser symbolic 'power modes'

content_defined_chunking.description: Enable Rabin-Karp chunking for cache-optimal output ordering

custom_aliases.description: Custom command aliases (array of {command, alias} entries)

default_tool_categories.description: Tool categories active by default (core, arch, debug, memory, metrics, session). Override via LCTX_DEFAULT_CATEGORIES

disabled_tools.description: Tools to exclude from the MCP tool list

enable_wakeup_ctx.description: Append wakeup briefing (facts, session summary) to ctx_overview output. Set false to reduce context bloat when calling ctx_overview frequently.

excluded_commands.description: Commands to exclude from shell hook interception

extra_ignore_patterns.description: Extra glob patterns to ignore in graph/overview/preload

extra_roots.description: Extra project roots for multi-root workspaces (auto-added to PathJail allow-list)

graph_index_max_files.description: Maximum files in graph index. 0 = unlimited (default). Set >0 to cap for constrained systems

max_disk_mb.description: Simplified disk budget in MB (0 = disabled). Distributes: archive ~25%, BM25 ~10%

max_ram_percent.description: Maximum percentage of system RAM that lean-ctx may use (1-50, default 5)

max_staleness_days.description: Auto-purge data older than N days (0 = disabled). Flows into archive.max_age_hours

memory_cleanup.description: Controls how aggressively memory is freed when idle

memory_profile.description: Controls RAM vs feature trade-off (performance = max quality)

minimal_overhead.description: Skip session/knowledge/gotcha blocks in MCP instructions

no_degrade.description: Disable all automatic read-mode degradation. Override via LCTX_NO_DEGRADE=1

output_density.description: Controls how dense/compact MCP tool output is formatted

passthrough_urls.description: URLs to pass through without proxy interception

permission_inheritance.description: Mirror the host IDE's permission rules onto lean-ctx tools (v1: OpenCode). When on, ctx_shell honors your bash/rm * rules instead of bypassing them. Override via LEAN_CTX_PERMISSION_INHERITANCE

preserve_compact_formats.description: Already-compact output formats preserved verbatim instead of recompressed (e.g. ["toon"]). Set to [] to disable

profile.description: Persistent profile name. Checked after LEAN_CTX_PROFILE env var. Set via: lean-ctx config set profile passthrough

project_root.description: Explicit project root directory. Prevents accidental home-directory scans

proxy_enabled.description: Enable/disable the proxy layer. null = auto-detect, true = force on, false = force off

proxy_port.description: Custom proxy port (default: 4444). Useful for multi-user systems. Env: LEAN_CTX_PROXY_PORT

proxy_timeout_ms.description: Proxy reachability timeout in ms (default: 200). Override via LEAN_CTX_PROXY_TIMEOUT_MS

redirect_exclude.description: URL patterns to exclude from proxy redirection

reference_results.description: Store large tool outputs as references instead of inline content

response_verbosity.description: Controls how verbose tool responses are

rules_injection.description: How rules load for CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/GEMINI.md agents: shared block, or dedicated (no shared-file edits; SessionStart hook / instructions[] / context.fileName). Override via LEAN_CTX_RULES_INJECTION

rules_scope.description: Where agent rule files are installed. Override via LEAN_CTX_RULES_SCOPE

savings_footer.description: Controls visibility of token savings footers: always (default, show on every response), never, auto (context-dependent). Also: LEAN_CTX_SHOW_SAVINGS=1|0

shadow_mode.description: Transparently intercept native Read/Grep/Shell calls via hooks and route them through lean-ctx

shell_activation.description: Controls when the shell hook auto-activates aliases

shell_allowlist.description: Optional shell command allowlist. When non-empty, only listed binaries are permitted

shell_allowlist_extra.description: Commands merged on top of shell_allowlist without replacing the defaults. Managed via `lean-ctx allow <cmd>`

shell_strict_mode.description: Block $(), backticks, <() in shell arguments. Default false = warn only.

slow_command_threshold_ms.description: Commands taking longer than this (ms) are recorded in the slow log. Set to 0 to disable

symbol_map_auto.description: Opt-in: ╬▒-code identifier substitution in aggressive reads (>50-file projects). Off by default ΓÇö abbreviated symbols hinder editing/refactoring

tee_mode.description: Controls when shell output is tee'd to disk for later retrieval

terse_agent.description: Controls agent output verbosity via instructions injection

tool_profile.description: Tool visibility profile: minimal (6 tools), standard (22), power (all). Override via LEAN_CTX_TOOL_PROFILE

tools_enabled.description: Explicit list of enabled tool names (overrides tool_profile when non-empty)

ultra_compact.description: Legacy flag for maximum compression (use compression_level instead)

search.description: Hybrid search weights for ctx_semantic_search (BM25 + dense vector + SPLADE + graph proximity)

bm25_candidates.description: Number of BM25 candidates to retrieve before fusion

bm25_weight.description: BM25 lexical search weight in RRF fusion

dense_candidates.description: Number of dense candidates to retrieve before fusion

dense_weight.description: Dense vector search weight in RRF fusion

custom_patterns.description: Additional regex patterns to detect as secrets

enabled.description: Enable secret/credential detection in tool outputs

setup.description: Controls what lean-ctx injects during setup and updates. Fresh installs default to non-invasive (rules/skills off, MCP on).

auto_inject_rules.description: Inject agent rule files during setup/update. null=auto (inject if already present), true=always, false=never

auto_inject_skills.description: Install SKILL.md files during setup/update. null=auto (install if rules present), true=always, false=never

auto_update_mcp.description: Register lean-ctx MCP server in editor configs during setup/update

check_interval_hours.description: How often to check for updates (hours)

notify_only.description: Only notify about updates, don't install automatically
